title: Botany Trees
description: Allows you to grow trees in small pots.
body:
This mod is an addon for Botany Pots. With this addon you will be able to grow trees from Vanilla and several other mods inside of the Botany Pot. This can be done for decoration or as a mini wood farm.

Currently Supported

  • Vanilla (6 trees)
  • Quark (5 trees)
  • Biomes O' Plenty (18 trees)
  • Forbidden Arcanus (2 trees)
  • Simple Farming (9 trees)
  • Biomes You'll Go (39 trees)
  • Better Default Biomes (2 trees)
  • Silent Gear (1 tree)
